title: Ebola Outbreak Could Become Worst on Record, Africa C.D.C. Chief Warns
summary_full: Health workers have warned that the outbreak, already one of the worst in decades, could take as long as a year to contain if infection rates do not flatten.
summary_public: Health workers have warned that the outbreak, already one of the worst in decades, could take as long as a year to contain if infection rates do not flatten.
